title: Critical: Payment Gateway Timeout on High Load
description: Customers are getting 504 errors during checkout on weekends.

title: Fix alignment in footer logo
description: The logo is shifted by 5px to the left in Safari.

title: Database Deadlock in Reporting Module
description: Generating the 'Yearly Report' causes the DB to freeze for 20s.

title: Update deprecated React libraries
description: We are using React 16.8. Need to upgrade to 18 to avoid security risks.

title: SQL Injection vulnerability in Search
description: Critical vulnerability found in the main search bar.

title: Refactor Legacy Auth Controller
description: The code is messy ('spaghetti code') but it works. Hard to maintain.

title: Optimize image compression for avatars
description: User avatars load slowly on 3G connections.

title: Add 'Dark Mode' feature
description: Customer request. Nice to have, not critical.

title: API Rate Limiting missing for public endpoints
description: Risk of DDoS attack if we don't implement rate limiting soon.

title: Typos in 'About Us' page
description: Spelling mistake in the CEO bio.

title: Memory Leak in Notification Service
description: Server crashes every 48 hours requiring restart.

title: Slow loading of Dashboard Charts
description: Charts take 5+ seconds to render for large clients.

title: Unit Tests failing in CI pipeline
description: Deployments are blocked because 3 tests are flaky.

title: Remove unused CSS files
description: Reduce bundle size by removing legacy styles.

title: Export to PDF feature throws error 500
description: Enterprise clients cannot download invoices.

title: Lack of documentation for API V2
description: New developers take too long to onboard due to missing docs.

title: Switch from AWS S3 to Azure Blob (Cost saving)
description: Strategic move to reduce cloud bill. High effort.

title: Login page not responsive on mobile
description: Mobile users cannot click the 'Login' button easily.

title: Hardcoded credentials in config file
description: Critical security risk. Needs immediate fix.

title: Add 'Export to Excel' for Admins
description: Feature request from Sales team.

title: Missing Index on 'Order History' table
description: Querying past orders takes >10s due to full table scan.

title: XSS vulnerability in User Comments
description: Malicious scripts can be injected into the product review section.

title: Broken favicon on Landing Page
description: The browser tab icon returns a 404 error on the home page.

title: Implement Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
description: Required for compliance. Support Google Authenticator app.

title: API Gateway Timeout on Batch Processing
description: Batch uploads larger than 10MB time out after 60 seconds.

title: Typo in 'Password Reset' success message
description: Message says 'email sent to you're inbox'.

title: Upgrade PostgreSQL to version 15
description: Current version reaches EOL next month. Need upgrade strategy.

title: Docker container restart loop in Staging
description: Staging environment is unstable due to configuration drift.

title: Pagination broken on 'All Users' list
description: Clicking 'Next Page' reloads the first page data.

title: Missing Alt Text for Product Images
description: Screen readers cannot describe images. SEO impact.

title: Cache Invalidation Issue on Price Updates
description: Users see old prices for up to 1 hour after admin updates.

title: 404 Error on 'Help Center' link
description: The link in the user dropdown redirects to a broken URL.

title: Add Multi-Language Support (Spanish)
description: Prepare architecture for i18n and add Spanish translations.

title: JWT Token Expiration Bug
description: Tokens expire 1 hour earlier than configured in env vars.

title: Increase File Upload Limit to 50MB
description: Clients need to upload high-res PDF blueprints.

title: Sidebar navigation overlaps content on iPad
description: Layout breaks on tablet portrait mode (768px).

title: GDPR: Add 'Delete Account' self-service
description: Users must be able to delete their data without emailing support.

title: Slow Query Log: Analytics Dashboard
description: Optimize the aggregation query for weekly sales stats.

title: Update Node.js to LTS (v20)
description: Keep up to date with LTS for security and performance patches.

title: Broken images in 'Welcome' email
description: Email templates point to staging bucket instead of production.

title: Race Condition in Inventory Management
description: Stock count goes negative if two users buy the last item simultaneously.

title: Setup Slack Alerts for Server Errors
description: Connect CloudWatch alarms to Slack channel #ops-alerts.

title: Search filters not clearing correctly
description: Reset button leaves the 'Date Range' filter active.

title: Optimize Background Job Worker
description: Queue processing is lagging during peak hours.

title: Breadcrumbs missing on Profile sub-pages
description: Navigation is difficult when deep inside settings.

title: Invoice Rounding Error (0.01 cents)
description: Floating point math issue causing tax discrepancies.

title: Implement Swagger UI for API Docs
description: Auto-generate documentation from code annotations.

title: Primary Button color mismatch
description: Using wrong hex code #0055AA instead of brand #004499.

title: Session persistence fails on browser restart
description: Users are forced to login again if they close Chrome.

title: Refactor 'UserManager' God Class
description: Class has 4000 lines of code. Needs to be split into services.
